summary: P0 Auth Loop Bug - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified the fail-open behavior fix on /api/calibration/status endpoint. Backend correctly returns 200 with NEEDS_CALIBRATION for malformed tokens instead of 401. Frontend properly redirects unauthenticated users to /login-supabase. No 'Authentication error' text on any page.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/calibration/status with no auth header returns 401
Backend: /api/calibration/status with malformed Bearer token returns 200 NEEDS_CALIBRATION (fail-open)
Backend: /api/calibration/status with JWT-format token (invalid sig) returns 200 NEEDS_CALIBRATION (fail-open)
Backend: /api/calibration/status with empty Bearer token returns 401
Frontend: Landing page loads without 'Authentication error' text
Frontend: Login page loads with Google & Microsoft OAuth buttons
Frontend: Register page loads without auth errors
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Fail-open behavior in /api/calibration/status (server.py lines 2353-2420) is working correctly
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js correctly sets authState=READY when no session, allowing login redirect
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js correctly handles all auth states and redirects unauthenticated to /login-supabase
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 auth loop bug is FULLY FIXED in this iteration. The fail-open behavior on /api/calibration/status is working correctly - malformed tokens return 200 with NEEDS_CALIBRATION instead of 401. Frontend properly redirects unauthenticated users to login page without showing 'Authentication error' screen. All 9 test requirements from the review request have been verified.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Previous iteration identified: Supabase token verification in backend was rejecting valid tokens as 'malformed JWT', and frontend was showing AuthError screen for unauthenticated users.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_verified: 1) Backend /api/calibration/status now has fail-open logic (lines 2353-2420) - if token verification fails but Bearer token exists, it returns 200 NEEDS_CALIBRATION. 2) Frontend SupabaseAuthContext.js sets authState=READY when no session, allowing ProtectedRoute to redirect to login. 3) AuthCallbackSupabase.js correctly checks calibrationData.status field.
rca_of_the_issue.verification_complete: All 9 test requirements from review request verified as passing on calibration-hub-9.preview.emergentagent.com
